targets.query: from(bucket: "network_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "network_flow") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, column: "_value")
from(bucket: "network_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "network_flow") |> group(columns: ["type"]) |> count()
